requestStateNotes.pending: Your message request is waiting for review before the conversation opens.
requestStateNotes.approved: Your message request was approved. You can use the conversation while it stays active.
requestStateNotes.rejected: This request was not approved. Use support if you still need help.
requestStateNotes.expired: This request expired before messaging could stay available.
requestStateNotes.cancelled: This request was cancelled and messaging is not available from it anymore.
requestStateNotes.revoked: Messaging access was revoked for this request.

conversationStateNotes.open: This conversation is active right now.
conversationStateNotes.pending: This conversation exists but is not fully active yet.
conversationStateNotes.expired: This conversation expired and no longer accepts new messages.

requestNotFound.heading: Care-chat request not found
requestNotFound.note: We could not find this care-chat request in the current workflow.

requestError.heading: Care-chat request is not available right now
requestError.note: Could not load this care-chat request right now.

conversationNotFound.heading: Conversation not found
conversationNotFound.note: We could not find this care-chat conversation in the current workflow.

conversationError.heading: Conversation is not available right now
conversationError.note: Could not load this care-chat conversation right now.

thread.heading: Conversation
thread.note: This conversation stays limited to the approved messaging flow.

empty.heading: No messages yet
empty.note: Messages will appear here once the conversation is active.

compose.heading: Send a message
compose.note: Keep the conversation focused on care follow-up within this approved flow.
compose.blockedNote: You cannot send a new message in this conversation right now.

items.approvalOnly: Messaging opens only after approval in the current workflow.
items.noGeneralChat: This is not a general chat product or open-ended messaging space.
items.sessionContext: When relevant, the request can stay tied to a real session context.

errors.activeRequestAlreadyExists: There is already an active care-chat request for this practitioner.
errors.requestNotFound: This care-chat request was not found.
errors.conversationNotFound: This care-chat conversation was not found.
errors.invalidLinkedSession: The linked session is not valid for this care-chat request.
errors.requestExpired: This care-chat request has already expired.
errors.invalidApprovalDecisionTransition: This request can no longer be approved or rejected from its current state.
errors.invalidRevokeTransition: This approved care-chat request cannot be revoked from its current state.
errors.conversationInactiveForSend: This care-chat conversation is not active for sending messages right now.
errors.patientProfileNotFound: Your patient profile could not be found.
errors.practitionerProfileNotFound: The practitioner profile could not be found.
errors.practitionerNotFound: We could not find that practitioner.
errors.generic: Could not complete this care-chat action right now.

meta.listDescription: Request care chat, track approval state, and continue approved care conversations.
meta.detailDescription: View care-chat request status and follow the approved next step.
meta.conversationDescription: Continue an approved care-chat conversation with clear boundaries.

home.title: Request messaging with a practitioner when it is the right next step
home.note: Submit a request when you need follow-up messaging with a practitioner. Messaging opens after approval.

create.heading: Start a message request
create.note: Choose the practitioner and send a short note. Messaging opens after approval.
create.helper: If this request is tied to a session, add the session ID (optional).

list.heading: Your message requests
list.note: Track approval state and continue only the conversations that were truly approved.

error.heading: Your message requests are not available right now
error.note: Could not load your message requests right now.

empty.heading: No message requests yet
empty.note: Start with a real practitioner or a session context when messaging is the right next step.

detail.title: Message request with {name}
detail.conversationNote: This request now has an approved conversation. Use it while the conversation remains active.

meta.listDescription: Review message requests and continue approved conversations.
meta.detailDescription: Review the request state and open the linked approved conversation when available.
meta.conversationDescription: Continue approved conversations with clear workflow boundaries.

home.title: Review approved and pending message requests
home.note: This area shows only the approval-based messaging flow. It is not a general messaging inbox.

list.heading: Message requests
list.note: Review which patient requests are still pending, approved, or no longer available.

error.heading: Message requests are not available right now
error.note: Could not load message requests right now.

empty.heading: No message requests right now
empty.note: Approved and pending message requests will appear here when they exist.

detail.title: Message request from {name}
detail.conversationNote: Open the linked conversation only while the approved messaging flow stays active.

meta.listDescription: Review message requests and manage the current bounded workflow.
meta.detailDescription: Approve, reject, or revoke message requests within the current workflow.
meta.conversationDescription: Read the approved conversation in a bounded, read-only admin view.

list.title: Message approvals
list.note: Review patient-to-practitioner message requests without turning this into a general chat product.
list.requestsNote: Focus on what is pending first, then inspect already decided requests when needed.

error.heading: Message approvals are not available right now
error.note: Could not load the approval queue right now.

empty.heading: No approval work right now
empty.note: There are no requests in this queue right now.

detail.title: Message request for {patient} with {practitioner}
detail.conversationNote: If this request already opened a conversation, you can inspect it in a read-only admin view.

approve.heading: Approve messaging
approve.note: Approve this request only when messaging is the right next step in the current context.
approve.notePlaceholder: Optional internal note for the approval decision

reject.heading: Do not approve
reject.note: Reject this request when messaging should not open from the current context.
reject.notePlaceholder: Optional internal note for the rejection decision

revoke.heading: Revoke access
revoke.note: Revoke only when this approved messaging flow should no longer remain active.
revoke.notePlaceholder: Optional internal note for this revoke action

readOnly.heading: No approval action is available now
readOnly.note: This request is already in a terminal or read-only state for admin action.

conversation.readOnlyNote: This is a read-only admin view of the approved conversation.
